entities.name: Howie
entities.context: Scheduling system integrated with V-OS for lead management

entities.name: V-OS Tags
entities.context: Tagging system for classifying and scheduling leads/contacts

entities.name: Lead Type (LD)
entities.context: Categorization framework: INV (investor), NET (networking), COM (community), CUS (customer), FND (founder)

entities.name: Goal/Phase/Timeline (GPT)
entities.context: Engagement stage framework: E (exploratory), M (mid-stage), C (critical/closing)

entities.name: Enrichment Priority
entities.context: Contact research prioritization framework: HIGH (active deals), MEDIUM (warm contacts), LOW (networking)

entities.name: KEY_MOMENTS (B21)
entities.context: Required documentation section, merged with B29 in v1.5

relationships.context: Tags used to inform Howie scheduling decisions
Lead Type is a category within the V-OS tagging system
GPT is a category within the V-OS tagging system
Accommodation is a category within the V-OS tagging system
Priority framework guides which contacts need V-OS tag assignment
